privileged_info_summary: The 'Invisibility Cloak' dataset is a fictional/synthetic dataset created by Andy Field for his textbook, not a real field experiment. The dataset actually has 3 columns (Participant, Cloak, Mischief) and 24 total participants (12 per group). Group 0 (no cloak) has a mean Mischief score of 3.750 (SD=1.913). Group 1 (wearing cloak) has a mean Mischief score of 5.000 (SD=1.651). A Student's Independent Samples T-test comparing Mischief between the Cloak groups (equal variances assumed) yields a t-statistic of -1.714 (or 1.714 depending on group order) with 22 degrees of freedom, and a two-sided p-value of 0.101.
